response: The actress who made her film debut in *Friday Night Lights* and also starred in the 2014 French-American crime-thriller *3 Days to Kill* is Amber Heard. She played her first leading role in *All the Boys Love Mandy Lane* (2006) and appeared in *Hidden Palms* (2007), before starring in *3 Days to Kill*, which was directed by McG and written by Luc Besson and Adi Hasak.
